text.title: Procurement Management Examples
text.summary: One end-to-end worked example showing how the procurement-management methodology converts inputs into a valid `spec` artefact. Trace mirrors the decision-tree example in `06-decision-tree.xml`.

example.setting: A representative case satisfying all `Applies If` preconditions.
example.trace: decision_open=true → make_or_buy_done=true → sow_drafted=true → weights locked → scored bid → vendor selected.
